summary: The diff implements all 6 requirements (REQ-27 through REQ-32). The Year field is added to the backend model, form modal, query hooks, table display, and PDF export. The logo is updated in the page header and PDF with graceful fallback handling. However, there is a minor discrepancy in REQ-30: the logo image file path referenced in code is 'naturavini-logo-v2.dim_400x200.png' (with dimension suffix) rather than 'naturavini-logo-v2.png' as specified. The WineTable.tsx diff is truncated so full verification of REQ-29 table display and REQ-31/REQ-32 PDF details cannot be confirmed from diff content alone.

missing_requirements.requirement: The logo image must be stored as frontend/public/assets/generated/naturavini-logo-v2.png and rendered in the header.
missing_requirements.reason: The PageHeader.tsx references the image at '/assets/generated/naturavini-logo-v2.dim_400x200.png' (with a dimension suffix in the filename) rather than the specified 'naturavini-logo-v2.png'. No evidence that the file is stored at the exact required path.

hallucinated_features.description: A dedicated migration module (backend/migration.mo) was created to handle schema migration for existing wine records when adding the year field.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for the year field to default to null for existing wines without data loss. A separate migration module file was not requested — this is an implementation detail that goes beyond the stated requirements.
